text:
is the main antagonist of the 2019 GODZILLA vs. EVANGELION crossover event at Universal Studios Japan, particularly the ride Godzilla vs. Evangelion: The Real 4-D. It would reapper in the P Godzilla vs. Evangelion ~G Cell Awakening~ pachinko machine on 19 December 2022.

Profile

History

Godzilla vs. Evangelion: The Real 4-D

King Ghidorah is the main antagonist of the 2019 Godzilla vs. Evangelion crossover event at Universal Studios Japan, particularly the ride Godzilla vs. Evangelion: The Real 4-D. It received a new updated design different from the previous incarnations as it fought against Godzilla and the Evangelions.

P Godzilla vs. Evangelion ~G Cell Awakening~

King Ghidroah would possess Rei Ayanami and turn her into Ghidorah Rei, making her an enemy of NERV.

See Also

Ghidorah Rei
Kaiser Ghidorah

Trivia

The designs in these two appearances are actually different. While the Universal Studios Japan attraction featured an original design, G Cell Awakening is primarily a recycling of the Heisei King Ghidorah with the addition of a Core mounted to the chest.
